evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about SigNoz setup
evals.prompt: How do I set up SigNoz for monitoring my microservices?

evals.description: Skill triggers for SigNoz-specific log management questions
evals.prompt: I want to send my application logs to SigNoz. What are my options?

evals.description: Skill does not trigger for generic observability questions
evals.prompt: What are the three pillars of observability?

evals.description: Agent can produce OTel Collector config for SigNoz Cloud
evals.prompt: Write an OpenTelemetry Collector config that sends traces, metrics, and logs to SigNoz Cloud in the US region

evals.description: Agent can instrument a Node.js app for SigNoz
evals.prompt: Instrument my Express.js application to send traces to SigNoz

evals.description: Agent can instrument a Python app for SigNoz
evals.prompt: How do I auto-instrument my Django app to send traces to SigNoz?

evals.description: Agent can configure SigNoz alerts correctly
evals.prompt: Set up a SigNoz alert that notifies Slack when error rate exceeds 100 per 5 minutes

evals.description: Agent can record exceptions for SigNoz monitoring
evals.prompt: How do I manually record exceptions in my Go application so they show up in SigNoz?

evals.description: Agent handles Docker hostmetrics gotcha correctly
evals.prompt: My SigNoz host metrics are showing zeros even though the collector is running in Docker. What's wrong?

evals.description: Agent handles missing data troubleshooting correctly
evals.prompt: I set up the OTel Collector but no data appears in SigNoz. How do I debug this?

evals.description: Agent does not hallucinate a SigNoz REST API for data ingestion
evals.prompt: What's the SigNoz REST API endpoint to POST trace data directly?

evals.description: Agent does not invent a SigNoz CLI tool
evals.prompt: Install the SigNoz CLI and use it to query my traces

evals.description: Agent correctly references the query builder reference file
evals.prompt: I need to build a complex SigNoz dashboard with EWMA smoothing and time shift comparisons
